response_text: Asana MCP succeeds on 67% of calls (n=3). median latency 230ms. most common errors: rate_limit (1x). common workaround: "Implemented exponential backoff with 1s initial delay. All tasks created successfully over 3 minutes.".
Backlog MCP succeeds on 90% of calls (n=91). median latency 100ms. most common errors: api_error (6x), search_miss (2x). common workaround: "Try category filter or Japanese keywords".

b→dash succeeds on 67% of calls (n=3). median latency 420ms. most common errors: invalid_input (1x). common workaround: "CDP-specific services (segment, mixpanel, bdash) not indexed or not matching 'customer data platform' intent. Treasure D".
